docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT JEFFERSON INSURANCE COMPANY
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. FILED BY DEFENDANT JEFFERSON INSURANCE COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-16-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $60.00 AS TO DEFENDANT JEFFERSON INSURANCE COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOTO ROJAS, SEBASTIAN PATRICIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JEFFERSON INSURANCE COMPANY JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT V. PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK: DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED VIA MAIL.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY SOTO ROJAS, SEBASTIAN PATRICIO AS TO DEFENDANT JEFFERSON INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF SEBASTIAN PATRICIO SOTO ROJAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JEFFERSON INSURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BRIAN BOYLES, CONTINUOUS IMPROVEMENT SPECIALIST. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2026 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM GRANTED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT. BRIAN BOYLES
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR BRIAN BOYLES FILED BY DEFENDANT JEFFERSON INSURANCE COMPANY
